CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT, doc XML);
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, doc) VALUES (1, '<?xml version="1.0"?><root id="test1"><child>value1</child></root>');
INSERT INTO xml_data (id, doc) VALUES (2, '<?xml version="1.0"?><root id="test2"><child>value2</child></root>');
SELECT xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) FROM xml_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM xml_data WHERE id > 0);
SELECT xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) FROM xml_data AS x JOIN (SELECT * FROM xml_data WHERE id = 2) AS y ON x.id = y.id;
SELECT x.id, xpath_string('/root/@id', x.doc) FROM xml_data AS x JOIN xml_data AS y ON xpath_string('/root/@id', x.doc) = xpath_string('/root/@id', y.doc) WHERE y.id = 1;
SELECT xml_data.id, xpath_string('/root/@id', xml_data.doc) FROM xml_data WHERE xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) FROM xml_data) AS count_results WHERE xpath_string('/root/@id', doc) = 'test1';
SELECT DISTINCT xpath_string('/root/@id', xml_data.doc) FROM xml_data WHERE doc IS NOT NULL;
